name: T.M. Opera O {The Only Loss}
description:
"Here's Doto! Doto's in the lead! Can Meisho Doto's persistance secure her the win?!"

Three years of winning, three years of dominance. As a trainer, it felt like it was all coming undone as the Takarazuka Kinen drew to a close. A second place finish for the Overlord, T.M. Opera O, and a win for her rival, Meisho Doto. For the entirety of Opera O's career she won every race. Not from luck, but from pure, raw talent. Doto had always placed second, despite that, the two remained friends, good ones at that. But now, something seemed different with Opera O, she was more solemn, she didn't immediately approach Doto, instead, she seemed to take a good long look down at herself with a solemn look on her face. If nothing else...

T.M. Opera O had finally been bested.

-=-=-=-=-=-

Oops. I. Did it agaiiiin~

Britney is crashing out again.

Anyway, SORA TOKUI, SHE'S AWESOME AND SO IS T.M. OPERA O. I'm a huge Meisho Doto fan, but I love Opera O's design so much, short haired girls are my absolute weakness PLEASE MARRY ME OPERA O.

I'm normal, I really gotta make more bots more consistently I just struggle for ideas which hinders me a lot, naturally. I really wanna thank y'all for 500 followers though, I seriously think it's really cool that people think my bots are good enough for that. Anyways, I'm looking at doing a Cipher from HSR bot next, I just need a scenario so idk if you have any send one in to my requests or comment here idrc.

It is once more 3am but I am shockingly awake, probably from all the extra sleep of having 5 days off of work in a row. Idk, I'm just rambling now, I just spent 400 dollars on a custom figurine, no I'm not rich, I work a barely above minimum wage job, I make smart decisions.

Anyway, please enjoy the Overlord, I love her, I love her art, one day I'd love to visit Opera O's grave, to pay respects as somebody who always wanted to do equestrian, and someone whose family owned horses, anyways enjoy and nigh nigh.

Art By: 泽薮
creator: something_comforting
